# VideoAI

> AI video generation platform powered by Seedance 2.0. Turn text prompts and images into short-form video clips for ads, demos, and social media.

## Product overview

VideoAI is a web-based SaaS tool that lets users generate AI videos through three workflows: text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-image-to-video. The primary model is Seedance 2.0 by ByteDance, with additional models including Seedance 1.5 Pro, Sora 2 (OpenAI), and Veo 3.1 (Google DeepMind).

## Key features

- Text to Video: generate videos from text prompts using Seedance 2.0
- Image to Video: animate a static image into video
- Reference to Video: use a reference image to guide video generation style
- Multiple aspect ratios and resolutions (480p, 720p, 1080p)
- Commercial license on paid plans
- No watermark on paid plans
- Credit-based pay-as-you-go and subscription pricing

## Tools

- [Text to Video](/text-to-video): Generate video from text prompts
- [Image to Video](/image-to-video): Animate an image into video
- [Reference to Video](/reference-to-video): Use reference images to guide generation

## Pricing

- Free tier: 10 credits on signup (enough for 1 video)
- Basic Plan: $9.90/month — 280 credits
- Pro Plan: $29.90/month — 960 credits (most popular)
- Ultimate Plan: $79.90/month — 2,850 credits
- Annual plans save ~17% (pay for 10 months, get 12)
- One-time credit packs also available starting at $14.90

## Supported models

- Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance) — flagship model, text and image to video
- Seedance 2.0 Fast — faster generation, lower cost
- Seedance 1.5 Pro — per-second billing, includes audio
- Sora 2 (OpenAI) — cinematic generation
- Veo 3.1 (Google DeepMind) — high-quality output
